title: Department Manager Vacancy at Om Book Shop - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Om Book Shop - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Om Book Shop is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Om Book Shop:
Om Book Shop is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Book Shop!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
